history.content:
<thought>
O agente está na posição (linha7, coluna4) e enfrenta o norte (cima). A célula à frente é lava (L), então não posso avançar. À esquerda tem uma parede (#), à direita há um espaço vazio (.) e atrás não é possível ver. Para prosseguir, devo girar no sentido horário para enfrentar o leste, pois assim poderei mover para a célula vazia à direita.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
O agente está na posição (7,4) e está voltado para o leste. À frente há uma parede (#), impossibilitando o movimento. A célula ao norte (6,4) é um piso seguro (.), enquanto ao sul está fora do mapa ou desconhecido. Para avançar em direção segura, devo girar no sentido anti-horário para ficar de frente para o norte.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Atualmente, estou voltado para o norte, com lava à frente e parede à esquerda. A única célula segura adjacente é a leste (.), mas mover para lá parece levar a um beco sem saída, pois ao norte de todas as células a leste também há lava. No entanto, explorar a leste pode revelar novas células desconhecidas à direita. Vou girar no sentido horário para ficar de frente para o leste, para então mover para a célula vazia.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Estou de volta à mesma orientação inicial, voltado para o norte. A célula diretamente à frente (ao norte) é um piso seguro (.), enquanto à esquerda há lava e à direita uma parede. A única ação viável para avançar é mover para frente. Isso me levará para a posição (6,4), onde poderei explorar mais a região e potencialmente encontrar um caminho para o objetivo.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
A célula diretamente à frente (norte) é um piso seguro (.), enquanto à esquerda há lava e à direita uma parede. Mover para frente me levará para uma nova posição onde poderei explorar mais. Não há outras ações viáveis no momento.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
Atualmente estou voltado para o norte. A célula diretamente à minha frente (norte) é um piso seguro (.) de acordo com a observação. Não há perigo imediato de lava ou parede nessa direção. Mover para frente me levará mais adiante no corredor. Depois disso, verei uma nova visão e poderei decidir para onde ir em seguida.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead (north) is a safe floor (.). Moving forward will bring me to a safe position. From there, I will need to turn left to avoid the lava ahead.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, but the cell directly ahead (north) is lava. The cell to the east (right) is a wall. The cell to the west (left) is a safe floor. To explore further and move toward the goal, I need to first turn counter-clockwise to face west, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at row1 col6. The agent is at row7 col4 facing west. The cell directly north (row6 col4) is floor, and column4 appears to be a safe vertical corridor up to row2. To reach the goal, I need to go north along column4, then east at row2, then north again. Therefore, I should first turn clockwise to face north.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, but the cell directly ahead is lava. The cell to the east is a wall, and to the west is safe floor. To reach the goal, I need to first turn to face west, then move forward. From the previous view after turning, I saw a clear corridor going north along column 4 and then east to the goal. So I will turn counter-clockwise to face west.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,4) facing west. The goal is at (1,6). There is a clear vertical corridor of floor cells along column 4 from row7 up to row1. The cell directly north (6,4) is floor. To head north, I need to turn clockwise from west to face north. Moving west would lead to a dead end because the cells to the west are mostly lava. So I will turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, but the cell ahead is lava. The goal is to the west and north. I need to turn to face west to move into the free floor cell to the west. Then I can proceed northward along the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at (6,3) facing west. The goal is visible at (0,5), far to the north and a bit east. Directly north of me (5,3) is a floor cell, so I can move north along the clear vertical corridor of column 3. To face north, I need to turn clockwise from west. Then I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,3) facing north. The cell directly ahead (5,3) is lava, so I cannot move forward. To my left (west) is a floor cell at (6,2), and to my right is a wall at (6,4). The only safe adjacent cell is west. I will turn counter-clockwise to face west, then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north, and the cell directly ahead (north) is a floor cell (safe). I can move forward to continue along the vertical corridor that leads to the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,4) facing north. The cell directly ahead at (6,4) is floor, so I can move forward safely. Continuing north along the clear column 4 will eventually allow me to reach row 3, then turn east to get to the goal at (2,6). So moving forward now is a good step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead of me (north) is a floor cell (.), so it is safe to move forward. I will continue moving north along this clear vertical path to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,3) facing north. The cell directly ahead at (5,3) is a floor cell (.), so it is safe to move forward. Continuing north will bring me closer to the goal. My plan is to go north twice, then east twice, then north to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,3) facing north. The cell directly ahead at (5,3) is a floor cell (.), so it is safe to move forward. This will bring me closer to the goal. After reaching (5,3), I will need to turn east and move further.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,4) facing north. The goal is at (5,6). The cell directly ahead (5,4) is floor, but beyond that, the path is blocked by lava at (5,5) and walls to the north. However, I can go east to (6,5) and then (6,6), then north to the goal. So I need to turn clockwise to face east first.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing east after the previous turn. The goal O is at (4,2) relative to my position (6,3). The cell directly ahead (east) is floor, but that path leads to lava later. The safe path is to go north first: from (6,3) to (5,3) (floor), then to (4,3) (floor), then west to (4,2) (goal). So I need to turn to face north. Turning counter-clockwise from east to north is appropriate.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (6,3) facing north. The goal O is at (5,5). Directly north is floor at (5,3), but beyond that is a wall at (4,3). The safe path is to go east from (6,3) to (6,4) (floor), then east to (6,5) (floor), then north to (5,5) (goal). I need to turn clockwise to face east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,4) facing north. The goal O is at (5,3). The cell directly north (6,4) is floor, and from there we can continue north to (5,4) then west to the goal. No lava in the immediate path. So moving forward is safe and progresses toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
